mapper.select: SELECT supplier_id, name, address, website, contact, phone, fax, email, description FROM supplier WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT supplier_id, name, address, website, contact, phone, fax, email, description FROM supplier
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier (supplier_id, name, address, website, contact, phone, fax, email, description) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{website}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{fax}, #{email}, #{description})
